display.purpose: Big numbers and statement headlines only — one per view.

shadows.name: card-lift
shadows.purpose: Signature soft far-cast lift under form cards and key panels (light theme).

shadows.name: focus-glow
shadows.purpose: Bronze focus ring on interactive elements — the lit-bulb moment.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default exponential ease-out for reveals and state transitions.

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: Gentle overshoot for tactile press/pop accents only.

motion.name: press
motion.purpose: Tactile active state on primary buttons.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid navy primary action — confident and tactile, with a satisfying press.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">ส่งฟอร์ม · Submit</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0E3361; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 15px 32px; font-family: 'Prompt','IBM Plex Sans Thai',sans-serif; font-weight: 800; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: background .15s, transform .1s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #072147; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(201,134,76,0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Toggle Tab
components.description: Segmented CTA-type picker; selected tab fills navy.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display:flex; gap:8px; } .ds-tab { flex:1; background:#fff; border:1.5px solid #E6E9F1; border-radius:12px; padding:11px 12px; font-family:'Prompt','IBM Plex Sans Thai',sans-serif; font-weight:800; font-size:13.5px; color:#5C6B82; cursor:pointer; transition:all .15s; } .ds-tab:hover { border-color:#C9864C; } .ds-tab.on { background:#0E3361; color:#fff; border-color:#0E3361; }

components.name: Floating-Label Input
components.description: Floating-label field with a warm bronze focus glow.
components.css: .ds-ff { position:relative; display:block; } .ds-input { width:100%; border:1.5px solid #E6E9F1; background:#fff; border-radius:12px; padding:22px 15px 7px; font-family:'Prompt','IBM Plex Sans Thai',sans-serif; font-size:15px; color:#0B1B33; transition:border-color .15s, box-shadow .15s; } .ds-fl { position:absolute; left:15px; top:15px; color:#8B98AE; font-size:14px; pointer-events:none; transition:all .15s; } .ds-input:focus { outline:none; border-color:#C9864C; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(201,134,76,0.15); } .ds-input:focus + .ds-fl, .ds-input:not(:placeholder-shown) + .ds-fl { top:7px; font-size:10.5px; font-weight:700; color:#A36738; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Soft-bronze featured tag — a sanctioned larger use of the accent.
components.css: .ds-badge { display:inline-block; background:#F6E5D0; color:#A36738; border:1px solid #C9864C; border-radius:8px; padding:2px 10px; font-family:'Prompt','IBM Plex Sans Thai',sans-serif; font-weight:800; font-size:13px; }

components.name: Chip
components.css: .ds-chip { display:inline-block; background:#fff; color:#5C6B82; border:1px solid #E6E9F1; border-radius:8px; padding:5px 10px; font-family:'Prompt','IBM Plex Sans Thai',sans-serif; font-size:12px; }

components.name: Form Card
components.description: Primary white card with the signature soft far-cast lift.
components.html:
รายละเอียดร้าน

Add your shop details and we'll feature your offer on the lobby screen.
components.css: .ds-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid #EEF1F6; border-radius:22px; padding:34px 32px; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(16,24,40,0.04), 0 14px 36px -14px rgba(16,24,40,0.12); } .ds-card-title { font-family:'Prompt','IBM Plex Sans Thai',sans-serif; font-weight:800; font-size:17px; color:#0B1B33; margin:0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family:'Prompt','IBM Plex Sans Thai',sans-serif; font-size:15px; line-height:1.6; color:#5C6B82; margin:0; }

components.name: Brand Wordmark
components.description: AquaMX wordmark — navy with the bronze X.
components.css: .ds-brand { font-family:'Prompt',sans-serif; font-weight:800; font-size:26px; color:#0E3361; letter-spacing:-0.02em; text-decoration:none; } .ds-brand .x { color:#C9864C; }

components.name: Kiosk Stage CTA
components.description: Dark-theme CTA for the 9:16 player — glassy outline on near-black, distance-legible.
components.css: .ds-stage { background:#050608; padding:40px; border-radius:14px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:20px; } .ds-stage-dot { width:10px; height:10px; border-radius:50%; background:#6DD5E8; box-shadow:0 0 12px #6DD5E8; } .ds-stage-cta { background:rgba(8,12,22,0.55); color:#fff; border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.32); border-radius:12px; padding:18px 40px; font-family:'Prompt','IBM Plex Sans Thai',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:20px; cursor:pointer; transition:border-color .2s; } .ds-stage-cta:hover { border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }

narrative.overview: AquaMX is a modern theatre marquee for the building lobby. Bronze lights the way against deep navy; the screen is confident and attention-catching, with the showmanship of a marquee that makes you stop and look — and the discipline of one that never blinks at you. Energy comes from light, motion, and a single warm accent, not from clutter. The screen is the pitch: a lobby that looks this good is the live demo that wins advertisers. The system runs in two registers of one identity — a light web theme (cool off-white, navy ink, bronze accent) for the sell and the forms, and a dark stage theme (near-black, white ink ramp, navy panels, one cyan indicator) for the 9:16 kiosk. One brand under two lights. It is bilingual to the core and explicitly rejects the generic SaaS template and the cluttered ad-board. Brass, not neon. Marquee, not billboard.
keyCharacteristics: Brass-on-navy: deep navy structure, one warm bronze accent that earns attention.
Two lights, one identity: a light web theme and a dark kiosk-stage theme sharing the same palette logic.
Energetic but disciplined — liveliness from motion and contrast, calm from generous space.
Bilingual Thai/English parity, always (Prompt + IBM Plex Sans Thai).
Confident, tactile components: solid navy actions, a warm bronze focus glow, a satisfying press.

rules.name: The One Bulb Rule
rules.body: Bronze is the single light on the marquee. It covers ≤10% of any screen — focus glow, one dot, one emphasized word. Navy carries weight; bronze earns attention.

rules.name: The Two Lights Rule
rules.body: A surface is either light-theme or stage-theme, never a muddy middle. Marquee Cyan is stage-only; Cream is light-only. Do not import one theme's signature color into the other.

rules.name: The Bilingual Parity Rule
rules.body: Every font stack ends in 'IBM Plex Sans Thai' before any generic fallback. A stack with no Thai family is forbidden — Thai silently renders in the wrong font.

rules.name: The Earned Kicker Rule
rules.body: Anton is for the one thing that matters on a view; a mono label kicker is occasional and deliberate, never an automatic eyebrow above every heading.

rules.name: The Flat-Stage Rule
rules.body: The kiosk stage uses no drop shadows. Depth is tonal — Stage Deep behind, Stage Mid panels, white-alpha ink steps. A shadow on near-black reads as dirt.

dos: Do keep bronze to ≤10% of any surface — focus glow, one dot, one emphasized word.
Do end every font stack with 'IBM Plex Sans Thai' before a generic fallback.
Do use the bronze focus glow (0 0 0 3px rgba(201,134,76,0.15)) on interactive focus.
Do size kiosk type for across-the-room legibility — large, high-contrast, never Ink-40.
Do keep light surfaces and the dark stage cleanly separated; cyan is stage-only, cream is light-only.
Do give body text Muted (#5C6B82) or Ink — the AA floor — and reserve Ink-40 for disabled/metadata.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion with a crossfade or instant fallback.
donts: Don't ship the generic SaaS-template look — stock gradients, identical icon-heading-text card grids, a hero-metric template.
Don't build the cluttered ad-board / mall-directory — crammed, competing, blinking promos.
Don't let 'modern & energetic' collapse into bright-gradient startup; energy is motion + brass-on-navy, not saturation.
Don't put a mono/uppercase eyebrow or numbered marker (01 / 02 / 03) above every section.
Don't use border-left/border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't use background-clip:text gradient text anywhere.
Don't drift the type: no Montserrat, no Nunito, no lone Inter replacing Prompt/Anton.
Don't add drop shadows on the dark kiosk stage — depth is tonal there.
